warnings: This record is a signal input to SEL; it does not claim SEL acted, did not act, or is required to act. SEL is the canonical enforcement authority.
Compliance posture observations are derived from the seeded loop only.
failure_prevented: Observe-only enforcement posture being read as enforcement passivity rather than the artifact-backed observation it is.
signal_improved: SEL has a named compliance signal input describing the observed gap and the suggested compliance signal to expose.
observed_gap: SEL enforcement_action_record currently reports observe_only with reason text but no first-class compliance_posture field. Downstream readers cannot tell observe_only-by-policy from observe_only-by-missing-evidence without parsing free text.
compliance_signal_needed: First-class compliance_posture field (e.g. enforced | observe_only_by_policy | observe_only_by_missing_evidence | unknown) with source_artifacts_used per case.
next_recommended_input: Forward this record to SEL alongside POL-SEL-CERT-COMPLETENESS for posture review.
